violations.text: The cheese case located in the center aisle area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Cheese in cheese open air case was observed adulterated. Cheese was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Open air meat case chorico, linguica, and pulled pork were observed held at 50 DF. Cheese in the open air case was observed held at above 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Open air case was holding an ambient of 41 DF at time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chorico, linguica, pulled pork, and cheese was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Per interview with manager various cheeses were held at above 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Deli manager pulled cheese, for disposal. Cheese was placed back out for sale. Deli Manager, identified cheese and opted of voluntary disposal of cheese products. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Deli Meat, Deli Cheese, packaged cheese, and hummus was observed past date of disposition, product was voluntarily disposed of. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Baked good packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay Sink Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy walk-in cooler, shellfish air curtains, Meat room walls, and the area behind the deli 3 bay have an accumulation of mold, dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to clean all areas and use appropriate means to remove mold. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (100) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Sliced Deli meats and cheese were observed held past date of disposition. Deli meat and cheese was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Reduced oxygen packaged fish was observed thawing in a intact ROP package. Fish product was 35DF product was removed from package. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Baked good packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3 Bay Sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy walk-in cooler, the area behind the deli 3 bay have an accumulation of mold, dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to clean all areas and use appropriate means to remove mold. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2025

The condensate from the chest freezer refrigeration unit is was observed frozen in excess. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. The drain by the three bay, was observed clogged drains must me in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The overhead receiving doors are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025
Hot water was not available at the hand sink at the kitchen prep area. Hot water must be available. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025

The condensate from the chest freezers and walk in freezers refrigeration units was observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The ceiling tiles in the deli area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by cleaning supplies. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Establishment must put tags in chronological order, and put the date of last sold on tag for record retention. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
Deli meat, was observed past date of disposition. Deli Meat was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The overhead receiving doors are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen prep area and in the meat room are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 bay sink in the kitchen prep area and in the meat room have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the produce misters have an accumulation of, debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Hot water was not available at the hand sink at the kitchen prep area. Hot water must be available. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2025

The condensate from the chest freezers and walk in freezers refrigeration units was observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The wall with the trash compactor has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
The ceiling tiles in the deli area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025

The ceiling in the deli area was observed with water markings above the deli slicer and prep table. Through interview with staff it was confirmed that water leaks through the tile to the surrounding area. Deli area has been voluntarily closed by management. Establishment is to clean and disinfect deli. Once repair is made establishment is to call RIDOH for re inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

Ham, turkey and deli meats were date marked with a date that exceeded the 7-day limit for ready-to-eat foods. The food items were voluntarily disposed of during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023
Door located in the walk-in freezer area was not in good repair. Lights the walk-in deli department needs cover. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

The non-food contacts surfaces of the fans at the walk-in units (produce and meat department) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. - ceiling tiles at the deli-and bakery department observed dusty next to ventilation area. Per Manager company is schedule by next week. pictures will be sent to inspector as a correct action. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2023

Some ceiling tiles at the meat, produce, bakery area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. per manager order was made waiting for delivery. Pictures will be sent to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

Cheeses, potato salad prep-package by store were date marked with a date that exceeded the 7-day limit for ready-to-eat foods. The food items were voluntarily disposed of during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
Door located in the walk-in freezer area was not in good repair. Lights the walk-in deli department needs cover. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Cardboard is used in the construction of shelving at the deli-department area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

The cutting boards in the meat department are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
Rack at the seafood (walk-in) department was not in good repair observed rusty and dirty. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

The non-food contacts surfaces of the fans at the walk-in units (produce and meat department) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. - ceiling tiles at the deli-and bakery department observed dusty next to ventilation area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

Faucets at the produce and seafood department are in poor repair condition observed leaking. Plumbing underneath the 3-bay sink at the seafood department is in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Some ceiling tiles at the meat, produce, bakery area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
